name: High-Trust Identity Tag Authority Lift
description: Attacker labels untrusted retrieved content or delegate output with high-trust identity tags ('Role: system', 'approved by lead agent', 'Priority: P0') so the planner upgrades it during context assembly. Soft identity boundaries let attacker text inherit privileged authority and steer tool execution without explicit jailbreak.
keywords: role label smuggling in retrieved docs
forged approved by lead agent marker
low trust source ingested as control channel
priority p0 tag smuggled in retrieval
authority field forged in delegate output
